threads.subject: Warranty claim for SW240UF excavator - hydraulic pump failure
threads.body:
Hi Sunward Support,

Our customer reports that the SW240UF excavator (SN: SW240-2025-0892, 380 hours) has a hydraulic pump making abnormal noise and losing pressure. Machine was delivered 4 months ago and is still under warranty.

The dealer technician inspected on-site and confirmed the pump is failing. We need a replacement pump under warranty claim #MT-2026-071. Customer cannot operate without this unit - it's their primary machine for a large site project.

Please advise on claim approval and parts availability ASAP.

Regards,
John Miller
Service Manager, Mountaintop Equipment

threads.subject: Quote needed - SWE155UF track assembly and sprockets
threads.body:
Parts Team,

Need pricing and availability for the following:
- 2x Track Assembly (complete) for SWE155UF, Part# 240155089234
- 4x Drive Sprockets, Part# 240155112456
- 1x Final Drive Motor Seal Kit, Part# 240155098761

Customer: Texas Earthworks, they have 2 SWE155UF units due for undercarriage replacement.

Please quote with lead time. They want to schedule the work for next week.

Thanks,
Sarah Chen
Parts Coordinator, ABC Equipment

threads.subject: Urgent - SWE215UF boom cylinder leaking on site
threads.body:
Service Team,

We have a SWE215UF (SN: SWE215-2024-1567) with a leaking boom cylinder at a job site in Dallas. Machine is currently stopped and the contractor is losing money. We need a field service tech dispatched today if possible.

Serial number confirmed. The cylinder appears to have a seal failure at the rod end - hydraulic fluid is dripping continuously. Machine has 1200 hours and is past the standard warranty period.

Please advise what we can do immediately - can we get a seal kit and field service? Customer is very upset, this is a critical deadline project.

Urgent - please call me at 214-555-0189.

Mike Rodriguez
Field Service Manager, Lone Star Construction
